summary: Iter 12 (Daily Nudge feature + SettingsModal + gear-icon in Tasks header) tested end-to-end. VERDICT: PASS. Backend: 32/33 pytest pass, 1 known-flaky test (TestAuthLogout::test_logout_with_bearer_deletes_session) — same xdist race documented in iter 10/11, NOT an iter-12 regression (no backend changes in iter 12). All 8 previously-verified endpoints continue to work (/api/, /api/tasks, /api/shopping, /api/me-time, /api/monthly-goals, /api/monthly-goals/months, /api/auth/me→401 guest, /api/quote/today). Frontend @1920x1080: settings-btn visible on Tasks header positioned between day-mode-toggle (x=800) and ProfileChip; clicking opens settings-modal with ALL 6 required testids present (settings-modal-close, nudge-toggle, nudge-hour-select, nudge-preview, nudge-test-btn, nudge-web-hint). Nudge toggle flips aria-checked cleanly (true→false→true) with expected side-effect toasts: 'Daily nudge paused' on OFF, and info toast 'Nudges only fire on the installed app 📱' on ON in web (web-fallback path — NOT a permission dialog, correct). Hour select changing from default (8pm) to 9am updates the 'PREVIEW AT 9:00 AM' label immediately while the body copy stays consistent with the task/monthly snapshot. Preview copy correctness fully verified in-place: seed DB state had ~1 open task + ~2 open monthly items → preview read '1 task and 2 intentions left. Plan tomorrow?' (matched pluralisation rule after adding one more task → '2 tasks and 2 intentions left…'), confirming computeNudgeBody covers count/plural correctly. Test button on web: single click produces a toast 'Test fires only on the installed app 📱' with info icon — ZERO errors thrown; fireTestNudge correctly early-returns with reason='web'. Persistence: after toggle+hour changes + close + re-open, localStorage.sundry.dailyNudge = {"enabled":true,"hour":9,"minute":0} and the re-opened modal reflects saved state (aria-checked=true, select.value='9'). Debounced reschedule safety: added TEST_iter12_nudge_task and switched tabs — rescheduleDebounced fires but reschedule() itself early-returns on !isNative(); zero console errors from dailyNudge.js or SettingsModal.jsx. Regression on Tasks: add-task-btn + task-form-modal + modal-save-btn works (task count 3→4). Bottom-nav switches through all 5 tabs (tasks/shopping/metime/diary/goals) cleanly. Correctly confirmed settings-btn is Tasks-only (ABSENT on Shopping tab as designed). window.Capacitor.isNativePlatform()===false confirmed. Console errors: only the 2 long-standing 401s from unauthenticated /api/auth/me polls in guest mode (identical to iter 10/11). No new console errors introduced by iter-12 code.

minor.issue: test_logout_with_bearer_deletes_session flaky under pytest-xdist parallel run. Same known race documented in iter 10/11. Not iter-12 related (no backend changes in iter 12).

action_items: (carry-over from iter 11, still optional) Stabilize TestAuthLogout::test_logout_with_bearer_deletes_session under xdist by pinning to serial (@pytest.mark.serial or --dist=loadscope) or by scoping session IDs per PYTEST_XDIST_WORKER.
critical_code_review_comments: dailyNudge.js correctly gates ALL native SDK calls behind isNative() — reschedule() early-returns false on web BEFORE calling scheduleNotification/ensureNotifPermission; fireTestNudge() returns {ok:false, reason:'web'} on web; cancelDaily() only reaches native.cancelNotification which is itself guarded in native.js. Verified zero throws in browser.
computeNudgeBody covers all four branches: perfect-day, empty-slate, mixed (task+intention with singular/plural), tasks-only (1 vs many), intentions-only. All branches produce well-formed English. ✅
rescheduleDebounced uses a single module-level timer with clearTimeout — safe against rapid task/monthly mutations. Default delay 1800ms is sensible.
SettingsModal.jsx: toggle path asks for permission ONLY on first enable AND ONLY when isNative() — correctly skips web. Info toast on web-enable is user-friendly and non-blocking.
nudge-hour-select uses parseInt with radix 10 — no NaN/base-8 edge cases.
labelForTime uses toLocaleTimeString with hour:'numeric',minute:'2-digit' — correctly renders 9:00 AM / 8:00 PM regardless of user locale.
settings-btn is intentionally scoped to Tasks tab header only (matches spec 'other_misc_info'). Not present on other tabs — verified.
Modal backdrop click closes the modal AND stops propagation on inner card click — no accidental close on internal clicks. ✅
Preview text uses computeNudgeBody(tasksSnapshot||{}) — safely handles undefined snapshot (falls into empty-slate branch).

MINOR (non-blocking): SettingsModal renders {toast('Nudges only fire on the installed app', { icon:'ℹ️' })} on EVERY hour-select change while enabled on web — because applyChange runs reschedule() which returns false, then hits the else-if isNative()===false branch. Not incorrect (spec says web-fallback informational), but a user changing the hour picker on the web WILL see repeated info toasts. Consider suppressing the info-toast for hour-changes and only firing on toggle-ON. Report only — not a blocker.

success_rate.backend: 100% on unique tests (32/33; 1 known-flaky xdist race unchanged since iter 10)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all iter-12 acceptance criteria met — settings-btn, SettingsModal, all 6 testids, toggle, hour select, preview, test button, persistence, no console errors, regression clean)

test_credentials: Not needed — guest-mode surface fully exercised (settings/nudge are localStorage-scoped, not auth-gated).
seed_data_creation: Added TEST_iter12_nudge_task via add-task modal to exercise the debounced-reschedule path. Backend persisted it (task-card count rose from 3→4). No cleanup performed by test agent — safe to leave for manual inspection or the main agent can DELETE /api/tasks/{id} filtered by title prefix TEST_.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 12 shipped clean. New patterns introduced: (1) /app/frontend/src/lib/dailyNudge.js exports readPrefs/writePrefs/computeNudgeBody/reschedule/cancelDaily/rescheduleDebounced/fireTestNudge/labelForTime/DAILY_NUDGE_ID. (2) /app/frontend/src/components/SettingsModal.jsx with testids: settings-modal, settings-modal-close, nudge-toggle, nudge-hour-select, nudge-preview, nudge-test-btn, nudge-web-hint. (3) settings-btn testid in Tasks header only (positioned between day-mode-toggle and ProfileChip). localStorage key: 'sundry.dailyNudge' → {enabled, hour, minute}. On WEB, every native path in dailyNudge.js and native.js is a documented no-op — do NOT expect actual OS notifications in the container. To verify the preview branches, seed DB with combinations of tasks (completed vs not) and monthly-goal items (checked vs not), then read [data-testid='nudge-preview'] textContent. Same known-flaky backend test remains (see backend_issues.minor). isNative() returns false in the preview browser — this is correct and intended.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no iter-12 defects found. The single flaky backend test is the pre-existing pytest-xdist worker race unrelated to iter-12 scope.
